_comment: iLovePPT runtime telemetry · Hybrid 架构后增强:每次 Stop 追加 1 行到 .claude/runtime.log,记 agent / session / tokens / cached / duration / tool_uses。Phase A (brainstorm team) 和 Phase B (subagent) 通过 CLAUDE_AGENT_NAME 区分。若 Claude Code 未暴露某字段则记 'na',不影响主要功能,事后审计可定位 telemetry 缺口。

hooks.command: printf '%s | agent=%s | session=%s | tokens_in=%s | tokens_out=%s | tokens_cached=%s | duration_ms=%s | tool_uses=%s\n' "$(date -u +%FT%TZ)" "${CLAUDE_AGENT_NAME:-main}" "${CLAUDE_SESSION_ID:-unknown}" "${CLAUDE_TOKEN_INPUT:-na}" "${CLAUDE_TOKEN_OUTPUT:-na}" "${CLAUDE_TOKEN_CACHED:-na}" "${CLAUDE_DURATION_MS:-na}" "${CLAUDE_TOOL_USE_COUNT:-na}" >> "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}/.claude/runtime.log"
